name: Walnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind walnuts into a fine powder using a food processor or mortar and pestle.
2. Whip the egg whites in a large bowl until they form soft peaks.
3. Gradually add the yolks, one at a time while continuing to whip.
4. Gently fold in 2 tablespoons of breadcrumbs and the ground walnuts by hand.
5. Butter a tube pan and sprinkle the remaining breadcrumbs evenly over the bottom.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
